THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT FOR PARTITION AND SALE OF REAL PROPERTY [CCP 872.720] PLAINTIFF COLOSSAL, INC. AND DEFENDANT AY LEE NAVRATIL ARE EACH OWNERS, AS TENANTS IN COMMON, OF THE REAL PROPERTY LOCATED AT 1345 BRUSSELS ST., SAN FRANCISCO 94134. DEFENDANT ANNA L. GO AKA ANNA AY LING GO AKA AY LING GO AKA ANNA LEE GO HAS NO LEGAL OR EQUITABLE INTEREST IN THE SUBJECT REAL PROPERTY. FRANK W. MAHONEY III IS APPOINTED AS REFEREE. AFTER THE SALE OF THE REAL PROPERTY, THE PROCEEDS SHALL BE DISTRIBUTED AS DETERMINED BY THE COURT AND SHALL INCLUDE SATISFACTION OF THE SENIOR LIENS RECORDED AGAINST THE SUBJECT PROPERTY. JUDGE THOMAS J. MELLON, JR. RETAINS JURISDICTION OF THIS MATTER UNTIL FINAL JUDGMENT IS ENTERED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REFEREE SHALL AWARD TO DEFT AY LEE NAVRATIL THE AMOUNT OF $39,639.39, AND DEFT AY LEE NAVRATIL SHALL ALSO RECEIVE DAMAGES OF $315.94 AGAINST DEFT ANNA LING GO. THE FOLLOWING AMOUNTS SHALL ALSO BE DISBURSED: REFEREE'S COSTS $2,011.95; REFEREE'S FEES $10,711; REFEREE'S ATTORNEYS' FEES $10,267.50; REFEREE'S ATTORNEYS' COSTS $36.30; AND FORMER TENANT RODERICK MCNALLY $190.
